user.title: Connect to AsicOS Miner
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your AsicOS Bitcoin miner.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the miner (e.g. 192.168.1.100)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure AsicOS Miner
reconfigure.description: Update the IP address or hostname of your AsicOS Bitcoin miner.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the miner (e.g. 192.168.1.100)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the miner. Please check the IP address and ensure the miner is online.
